animal_reproductive_events_shape.name: animal_reproductive_events_shape
animal_reproductive_events_shape.value:
("animal_reproductive_events"."type" = 'CALVING' and "animal_reproductive_events"."had_breeding" = false and "animal_reproductive_events"."bull_name" is null and "animal_reproductive_events"."outcome" is null and "animal_reproductive_events"."outcome_recorded_on" is null)
    or
    ("animal_reproductive_events"."type" = 'HEAT' and (
      ("animal_reproductive_events"."had_breeding" = false and "animal_reproductive_events"."bull_name" is null and "animal_reproductive_events"."outcome" is null and "animal_reproductive_events"."outcome_recorded_on" is null)
      or
      ("animal_reproductive_events"."had_breeding" = true and "animal_reproductive_events"."outcome" is not null)
    ))

animals_name_or_tag.name: animals_name_or_tag
animals_name_or_tag.value: "animals"."name" is not null or "animals"."tag_number" is not null

daily_milk_totals_non_negative.name: daily_milk_totals_non_negative
daily_milk_totals_non_negative.value:
"daily_milk_totals"."total_liters" >= 0 and
    ("daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" is null or "daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" >= 0) and
    ("daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters" is null or "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters" >= 0)

daily_milk_totals_periods.name: daily_milk_totals_periods
daily_milk_totals_periods.value:
("daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" is null and "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters" is null)
    or
    ("daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" is not null and "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters" is null and "daily_milk_totals"."total_liters" = "daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters")
    or
    ("daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" is null and "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters" is not null and "daily_milk_totals"."total_liters" = "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters")
    or
    ("daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" is not null and "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters" is not null and "daily_milk_totals"."total_liters" = "daily_milk_totals"."morning_liters" + "daily_milk_totals"."afternoon_liters")

milk_measurements_non_negative.name: milk_measurements_non_negative
milk_measurements_non_negative.value:
("milk_measurements"."total_liters" is null or "milk_measurements"."total_liters" >= 0) and
    ("milk_measurements"."morning_liters" is null or "milk_measurements"."morning_liters" >= 0) and
    ("milk_measurements"."afternoon_liters" is null or "milk_measurements"."afternoon_liters" >= 0)

revenues_non_negative_details.name: revenues_non_negative_details
revenues_non_negative_details.value:
("revenues"."quantity" is null or "revenues"."quantity" > 0) and
    ("revenues"."unit_price" is null or "revenues"."unit_price" >= 0) and
    "revenues"."bonus_amount" >= 0 and "revenues"."discount_amount" >= 0

revenues_period.name: revenues_period
revenues_period.value: "revenues"."period_end" is null or "revenues"."period_start" is null or "revenues"."period_end" >= "revenues"."period_start"
